note: Furnipart wordmark 'furnipart' is a monochrome lowercase serif wordmark (staged white-on-transparent PNG, traced to a flat single-path SVG via furnipart-trace.mjs so Three.js SVGLoader can extrude it). Brand metadata color is Furnipart teal-petrol #063545. On the dark-green hero bg a teal logo reads dark-on-dark, so the 3D hero logo is rendered in cream #F2EDE4 (data-material=metal data-color=#F2EDE4) per the Ajax/Avantopool/Weltevree monochrome-dark-logo precedent — Villa Sjövik gold treatment. Villa Sjövik logo always gold. Canonical dark-green palette unchanged; teal only as metadata accent.
